commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a shared Convex download-metering path with a new daily dedupe table, pruning cron, route updates for skill ZIP/package ZIP/npm tarball downloads, tests, generated API typing, and a spec note.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a backend metrics feature PR, not a bug report. The review used source/diff inspection plus the targeted tests listed in the PR body rather than a current-main failing reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review should decide the counter-compatibility and privacy tradeoffs; I did not find a narrow mechanical code defect suitable for an automated repair PR.

target.title: Add shared download metering
target.body:
## Summary

This PR adds a shared daily download dedupe path for skill downloads and package/plugin downloads.

Before this change, the two paths counted downloads differently:

- skill ZIP downloads were deduped by skill + identity + hour
- package/plugin downloads wrote raw package stat events, so repeated downloads could each increment the package download count

After this change, both paths use the same dedupe rule:

- identify the target as either `skill` or `package`
- identify the requester as a user when available, otherwise by client IP
- hash the identity before storing it
- count at most one download per target + identity + UTC day
- feed the existing skill/package stat-event pipelines after dedupe

## Behavior

The visible count model stays simple:

```text
downloads
```

The user/IP distinction is only kept as dedupe metadata:

```text
identityKind: "user" | "ip"
identityHash: string
```

This does not add user-vs-IP reporting buckets. It also does not rewrite or estimate historical counts.

The metric path remains best-effort. Download responses still succeed if metric recording fails.

## Data Model

Adds one new generic dedupe table:

- `downloadMetricDedupes`

The existing `downloadDedupes` table is skill/hour-specific, so this PR leaves it in place for existing rows and uses the new table for the shared skill/package daily rule.

This PR does not add daily rollup tables, weekly snapshot tables, or new reporting crons.

## Routes Updated

- skill ZIP downloads now schedule `downloadMetrics.recordDownloadMetricInternal`
- package legacy ZIP downloads now record package download metrics through the shared dedupe path
- ClawPack/npm tarball downloads now record package download metrics through the shared dedupe path
- npm-style package installs still record installs, and the downloaded tarball also contributes to deduped download metrics

## Tests

- `bun run test -- convex/downloadMetrics.test.ts convex/downloads.test.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `bun run format:check`
- `bun run lint`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit`
- `bunx tsc -p packages/clawhub/tsconfig.json --noEmit`

Not run:

- `bun run test`
- `bun run build`
- `bun run coverage`
- `bunx convex deploy`
